zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire於1382年9月1日出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾海利斯 卡素時，他的父親Patrick de Hepburn31歲，母親Countess of Vaux Beatrice de Vaux37歲。他於大約1386年與Agnes Anna Keith在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安可利頓結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1448年6月15日在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安普雷斯頓吉可享年65歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭費伏考登亞斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire于1382年9月1日出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾海利斯 卡素时，他的父亲Patrick de Hepburn31岁，母亲Countess of Vaux Beatrice de Vaux37岁。他于大约1386年与Agnes Anna Keith在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安可利頓结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1448年6月15日在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安普雷斯頓吉可享年65岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰費伏考登亞斯。

nameMeanings.name: Hepburn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Durham) and Scottish: habitational name from Hepburn in Chillingham (Northumberland), Hebron (Northumberland), or Hebburn in Jarrow (Durham). The placenames probably all derive from Old English hēah ‘high’ + byrgen ‘burial place, tumulus’. Compare Hebron .

variants.name: Eborn
meanings: English (Middlesex, Buckinghamshire, and Oxfordshire): variant of Eburne, itself a possible variant of Hepburn . However, the placename Hepburn comes from northeastern England, and the H- spellings are a late development, which reinforces the suspicion that the name may have a different but unknown derivation.

variants.name: Hebron
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Hebron (Northumberland), possibly from Old English hēah ‘high’ + byrgen ‘burial place, tumulus’. See also Hepburn .
Czech: from the Biblical placename (II Samuel 2: 1-3), said to mean ‘alliance’ in Hebrew.

variants.name: Heyburn
meanings: English: habitational name from a lost or unidentified place, probably in southern England, named with an unknown first element + Old English burna ‘spring, stream’.
Irish (Ulster): possibly a variant of Scottish   Hepburn  .

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire was born on 1 September 1382, in Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, his father, Patrick de Hepburn, was 31 and his mother, Countess of Vaux Beatrice de Vaux, was 37. He married Agnes Anna Keith about 1386, in Colinton, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 15 June 1448, in Prestonkirk, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in Cowdenbeath, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire est né le 1 septembre 1382, à Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, Patrick de Hepburn, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Countess of Vaux Beatrice de Vaux, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Anna Keith environ 1386, à Colinton, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 15 juin 1448, à Prestonkirk, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Cowdenbeath, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire am 1. September 1382 in Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Patrick de Hepburn 31 und seine Mutter Countess of Vaux Beatrice de Vaux 37. Er hat um 1386 in Colinton, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom Agnes Anna Keith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 15. Juni 1448 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Prestonkirk, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Cowdenbeath, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire è nato il il 1 settembre 1382 nel Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Patrick de Hepburn, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Countess of Vaux Beatrice de Vaux, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Anna Keith circa 1386, nel Colinton, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 15 giugno 1448, nel Prestonkirk, East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Cowdenbeath, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshireが1382年9月1日にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアヘイレス カストルで生まれた時，父Patrick de Hepburnは31歳，母Countess of Vaux Beatrice de Vauxは37歳であった。約1386年にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンコリントンでAgnes Anna Keithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1448年6月15日にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンプレストンキルクで65歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドフィフコウデンベアスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire(이)가 1382년 9월 1일 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 하일레스 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Patrick de Hepburn(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Countess of Vaux Beatrice de Vaux(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1386년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 콜린턴에서 Agnes Anna Keith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1448년 6월 15일 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 플레스토커크에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 코우덴브이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire nasceu em 1 de setembro de 1382, em Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Patrick de Hepburn, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Countess of Vaux Beatrice de Vaux, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Anna Keith aproximadamente 1386, em Colinton, Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 15 de junho de 1448, em Prestonkirk, East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Cowdenbeath, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire родился 1 сентября 1382 г. в местности хеилесь кастл, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Patrick de Hepburn было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Countess of Vaux Beatrice de Vaux, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Anna Keith около 1386 г. в местности колинтон, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 15 июня 1448 г. в местности престонкирк, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности коуденбит, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire nació el 1 de septiembre de 1382, en Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, su papá, Patrick de Hepburn, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Countess of Vaux Beatrice de Vaux, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Agnes Anna Keith aproximadamente 1386, en Colinton, Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 15 de junio de 1448, en Prestonkirk, East Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Cowdenbeath, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido.
